---
title: "Pattern Recognition — Lecture Slides"
subtitle: "FYS-3012, UiT The Arctic University of Norway"
author: "Kristoffer Wickstrøm"
date: today
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: simple
    transition: fade
    slide-number: c/t
    chalkboard: true
    smaller: true
    scrollable: true
    code-line-numbers: true
    code-overflow: wrap
    incremental: false
---

## Welcome {.center}

These are the static, always-available lecture slides for *FYS-3012 - Pattern
Recognition*. They are rendered from the source notebooks and updated
automatically on every push to the `main` branch — no live kernel needed, so
they never time out.

Use the arrow keys to navigate. Press <kbd>b</kbd> to open the chalkboard for
live annotations and <kbd>s</kbd> for the speaker view.

## Module 1 — Foundations

- [Introduction to pattern recognition](notebooks/00/intro.html)
- [Bayes decision theory](notebooks/01/bayes_decision_theory.html)
- [Density estimation I — parametric & non-parametric](notebooks/02/density_estimation.html)
- [Density estimation II — kNN & mixture models](notebooks/02/mixture_models.html)

## Module 2 — Linear classifiers

- [Linear classifiers I — MSE, LSS, perceptron](notebooks/03/linear_classifiers.html)
- [Linear classifiers II — support vector machines](notebooks/03/support_vector_machine.html)

## Module 3 — Non-linear classifiers

- [Neural networks I — MLP & backpropagation](notebooks/04/neural_networks_1.html)
- [Neural networks II — activations & training tricks](notebooks/04/neural_networks_2.html)
- [Neural networks III — representation learning](notebooks/04/neural_networks_3.html)
- [Radial basis function networks](notebooks/05/rbf_networks.html)
- [Kernel methods & non-linear SVMs](notebooks/06/kernel_methods.html)

## Module 4 — Dimensionality reduction

- [Linear dim. reduction — FDA & PCA](notebooks/07/linear_dim_reduction.html)
- [Non-linear dim. reduction — Kernel PCA & Laplacian Eigenmaps](notebooks/08/non_linear_dim_reduction.html)

## Module 5 — Ranking & clustering

- [Ranking & PageRank](notebooks/09/ranking.html)
- [Sequential clustering](notebooks/10/seq_clustering.html)
- [Hierarchical clustering](notebooks/11/hier_clustering.html)
- [K-means & spectral clustering](notebooks/12/clustering.html)
- [Clustering evaluation](notebooks/13/clustering_eval.html)

## Keyboard shortcuts

| Key | Action |
| --- | --- |
| <kbd>←</kbd> / <kbd>→</kbd> | previous / next slide |
| <kbd>↑</kbd> / <kbd>↓</kbd> | previous / next sub-slide (vertical) |
| <kbd>Space</kbd> | advance |
| <kbd>b</kbd> | open chalkboard |
| <kbd>s</kbd> | speaker view |
| <kbd>f</kbd> | fullscreen |
| <kbd>?</kbd> | help overlay |
